Caption: A picture (a) and a scheme with dimensions (in mm) (b) of the 20-A h LTO prismatic cell under investigation; the 48V battery stack with bonnet, walls and cables (c) and the position of thermocouples array in the module (d).

Air outlet are positioned on the grilles (2). In (c) (front) and (d) (bottom) the 20 thermocouples position is reported (red): sA and sB are considered for model validation. Mesh independence study for the fans on case: the variation of sB probe temperature at t equal to 1620s varying the mesh elements number is lower than 1%.

Validation tests for the fans on (a) and fans off (b) modes. Temperature evolution during a 80 min constant-current discharge–charge cycle. The experimental and simulated sA and sB probes temperatures are plotted.
